rationale: The 'reg.exe' process (EV-001) was used to add a registry value 'UserInitMprLogonScript' under HKCU\Environment, setting its data to 'C:\Windows\System32\calc.exe' (A0). This registry key is a known persistence mechanism, allowing an attacker to execute a program upon user logon. While 'calc.exe' is benign, its use here demonstrates a successful attempt to establish persistence.
